subtitle.text: Hemolymph Sac from the Warped Mosco. Divine Soulshard from the ISS Priest. The eye is a synthesis.

description: CH.11 · THE CORRUPTED EYE
▸ The Corrupted Eye recipe spans three mod families.
It is the most ingredient-intensive eye in the portal.
It requires the Nether (for the Mosco),
the magical dimension (for the Priest),
and something from the Biological Civilization.
Gather all three before attempting to craft.
◈ CORRUPTED EYE INGREDIENTS
└ ✦ Hemolymph Sac (alexsmobs:hemolymph_sac)
Source: Warped Mosco — Alex's Mobs boss
Found in: Warped Forest biome, Nether
The Mosco is the mushroom-carapace entity
that holds the Warped Forest biome memory
└ ✦ Divine Soulshard (irons_spellbooks:divine_soulshard)
Source: ISS Priests / Dead King area mobs
Drops from: ISS holy-type enemy mobs
Also found in: Dead King dungeon chests
└ ✦ Third ingredient: check JEI for full recipe
(involves Biological Civilization artifact or craft)
◈ WARPED MOSCO FARMING
└ Spawns in Warped Forest biome clusters
└ Melee range: medium — manageable with Ignitium gear
└ Hemolymph Sac: drop rate is moderate — expect
2-4 Mosco kills per guaranteed sac
└ Looting III: increases sac drop rate
└ Note: Mosco is Alex's MOBS, not Alex's Caves
(separate mod, `alexsmobs:` namespace)
◈ ISS PRIEST FARMING
└ Divine Soulshard: drops from ISS holy-type enemies
└ Also used in: Magical Eye recipe
(two different eyes need Soulshard — farm more than 1)
└ Dead King dungeon: highest density ISS holy mob area
Best source for both Soulshard and ISS drops
▸ The Biological Civilization did not corrupt themselves.
They were transformed by what they studied.
The distinction mattered to them.
It stopped mattering when the transformation finished.
▶ Obtain a Hemolymph Sac
▶ Obtain a Divine Soulshard
◇ Divine Soulshard is also used in the Magical Eye.
Farm the Dead King area with both eyes in mind.
Two eyes. One dungeon. One farm run.
